name: development-discipline
description: John's personal development workflow discipline: test-first implementation, scoped verification, debugging, review handling, and skill authoring.

interface.shortDescription: Personal workflow skills for disciplined development work.
interface.longDescription: Use Development Discipline when Codex needs John's tuned workflow for test-first implementation, fresh verification, final review before PRs or merges, compact root-cause debugging, technically rigorous code-review handling, or marketplace skill authoring. The skills are local canonical guidance and do not require upstream workflow plugins.
defaultPrompt: Use John's test-first development workflow for this change.
Verify this work against the actual claim scope before calling it done.
Run a final multi-lens review before opening the pull request.
Handle this review feedback with technical rigor.
